title: Nursery Rhyme. XLIX. Tales.
content:
Solomon Grundy,
        Born on a Monday,
        Christened on Tuesday,
        Married on Wednesday,
        Took ill on Thursday,
        Worse on Friday,
        Died on Saturday,
        Buried on Sunday:
        This is the end
        Of Solomon Grundy.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XLIX. Tales." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
